windows.embed_text_v2: Weighing melted golden candle wax in an aluminium pouring pitcher on a digital kitchen scale beside a black tapped wax melter; measuring wax to calculate fragrance oil dose.
windows.summary_v2: Aluminium pitcher of melted golden wax sits weighing on a digital kitchen scale beside a tapped wax melter — measuring wax weight to calculate fragrance load.

tags_v2.action: weighing melted wax on digital scale

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down workstation view: a tall aluminium pouring pitcher of clear molten golden wax sits on a digital kitchen scale (lit blue display); a black wax melter with a metal tap/spigot at left, power strip behind; small channel watermark top-left.
Same composition; the scale display shows a tare/measurement reading; wax surface still.
Static — molten golden wax in the pitcher sitting on the lit scale; tap of the melter at left.
Continued — wax in the pitcher; scale showing a numeric reading; setup unchanged.
Hand pulls back from earlier reach near the front of the scale; small pink/red object briefly visible — perhaps a thermometer probe.
Static — pitcher of molten wax weighing on the scale; setup unchanged.
Pitcher of melted golden wax still being weighed; scale display lit and reading.
Final frame: same — aluminium pitcher of molten wax on the scale beside the wax melter, ready for fragrance to be added based on the weight.

windows.old_description: Rows of filled amber jars setting.
windows.embed_text_v2: pouring molten golden wax from a grey metal pitcher into amber glass candle jars with centered wicks held by yellow wick bars, filling a row of jars on Avery label sheets, top-down
windows.summary_v2: Molten golden wax is poured from a metal pitcher into a row of wicked amber glass jars on label sheets, filling each candle around its centered wick.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view of molten golden wax being poured from a grey pitcher into the first amber glass jar in a row of wicked jars on Avery label sheets.
The honey-colored wax streams into the first amber jar, its centered wick held by a yellow wick bar; neighboring jars already partly filled.
A thin stream of molten wax continues filling the left jar around its wick, the pour pitcher tilted at bottom of frame.
The pitcher shifts as golden wax fills the jar near the wick sticker, more amber jars lined up to the right.
Wax level rises in the jar; the steady stream pours beside the centered wick as the row of jars fills.
Molten wax keeps pouring into the amber jar around the yellow-tabbed wick, surface glossy gold.
The pour continues into the next jar, golden wax swirling around the upright wick, jars seen from above.
The silver pouring pitcher tilts over the filled amber jars, finishing pouring molten wax around the centered wicks.
